Name: GraphicsConfig_ShadowQuality_win64
Description: Determines the parameters of each shadow quality level.

Fields.Name: Shadow Map: Resolution Scaler
Fields.Description: The resolution scaler to apply to shadow maps.

Fields.Name: Shadow Map: Resolution Divisor
Fields.Description: The resolution divisor to apply to shadow maps.

Fields.Name: Shadow Map: Minimum Resolution
Fields.Description: The minimum resolution for a shadow map.

Fields.Name: Shadow Map: Maximum Resolution
Fields.Description: The maximum resolution for a shadow map.

Fields.Name: Shadow Map: Blur Count Bias
Fields.Description: The shadow map blur count bias to apply (set count bias, unchanged at 0).
